messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: 32 CLI test files spawn a fresh node per test case, paying ~150-200ms of process startup before a single assertion runs
What it solves: THE DEFECT, VERIFIED 2026-07-14. 33 files under `extension/test/` drive the CLI under test by
`execFileSync('node', ...)` / `spawnSync('node', ...)` PER TEST CASE. Node startup is ~150-200ms
host-side before any assertion runs, and it is paid once per test, not once per file. This ticket
owns 32 of…
How it works: A CLI's behavior is proven without spawning a process
